name: opcua-kb-mcp
description: OPC UA Knowledge Base MCP Server — 11 tools: structured search, RAG Q&A, validate/compliance/compare NodeSets, and modelling guidance for all OPC UA specifications and companion specs.

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Search OPC UA NodeSet nodes with structured filters (node class, spec, parent type, modelling rule). Version-aware.

tools.name: get_type_hierarchy
tools.description: Get ObjectType inheritance chain with declared/inherited member counts.

tools.name: get_spec_summary
tools.description: Get pre-computed NodeSet statistics for a companion spec or all specs.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Full-text search across OPC UA specification HTML pages and tables. Version-aware.

tools.name: search_docs_rag
tools.description: RAG Q&A grounded by the OPC UA spec corpus (KB retrieve + GPT-4o).

tools.name: count_nodes
tools.description: Faceted aggregation by node_class, spec_part, modelling_rule, or data_type.

tools.name: list_specs
tools.description: Ranked catalog of all indexed companion specs and CloudLib NodeSets.

tools.name: validate_nodeset
tools.description: Validate NodeSet XML (inline ≤30KB, blob: ref, or https URL) against OPC UA + OPC 11030 best practices.

tools.name: compare_versions
tools.description: Compare two spec versions, classify changes as backward-compatible or breaking.

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Check a NodeSet implementation (inline, blob: ref, or https URL) against a companion spec.

tools.name: suggest_model
tools.description: Suggest OPC UA information model design based on a domain description.
